activities_projects.title: Crop Variety Improvement Study
activities_projects.objective: Understand the concept of crop variety improvement
steps: List characteristics required for improved crop varieties
Research methods like hybridisation and genetic improvement
Prepare a short report explaining their benefits
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Explains how crop varieties are improved for higher yield
activities_projects.evaluation: Accuracy of report and explanation (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Manure vs Fertilizer Comparison
activities_projects.objective: Compare organic manure and chemical fertilizers
steps: List properties of manure and fertilizers
Create a comparison table
Explain advantages and disadvantages of each

activities_projects.title: Macro and Micro Nutrients Chart
steps: List macro-nutrients and micro-nutrients
Draw a table explaining their functions
Add examples of sources
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Identifies nutrients essential for plant growth

activities_projects.title: Irrigation Methods Model
steps: Create a small model farm
Demonstrate irrigation using channels
Explain how water reaches crops
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands irrigation systems and water management
activities_projects.evaluation: Functionality and explanation of model (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Intercropping Pattern Diagram
steps: Choose two crops grown together
Draw rows representing intercropping
Explain advantages of this pattern
activities_projects.evaluation: Accuracy of diagram and explanation (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Crop Protection Survey
steps: Talk to a local farmer or research online
List common crop pests and diseases
Write methods used to control them

activities_projects.title: Cattle Farming Case Study
steps: Research feeding, shelter and breeding practices
Identify milch and draught animals
Prepare a short case study

activities_projects.title: Poultry Breeds Information Sheet
steps: List indigenous and exotic poultry breeds
Write their characteristics
Explain their use for egg or meat production

activities_projects.title: Composite Fish Culture Diagram
steps: Draw a fish pond showing different fish species
Label surface, middle and bottom feeders
Explain why this system increases yield
activities_projects.evaluation: Clarity of diagram and explanation (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Bee Species Identification
activities_projects.objective: Learn about bee varieties used for honey production
steps: List common bee species used in beekeeping
Write characteristics of each species
Explain their importance in honey production
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Recognizes bee varieties used in apiculture
